subject: FIELD — On your side. Not theirs.
body:
FIELD: Global Sports Intelligence

On your side. Not theirs.

On any given night there are a dozen games. You have two hours. FIELD tells you which one is worth watching, what it costs, and why it matters.

No ads. No partners. Nothing to sell you.

Live at: https://jubilant-bassoon.jeffunglesbee.workers.dev
html:
Global Sports Intelligence
FIELD
On your side. Not theirs.
The Problem It Solves
On any given night there are a dozen games. You have two hours. No one tells you which one is actually worth watching — what it costs to watch it, or why tonight’s game matters in the season’s larger story.
Streaming guides are owned by streamers. Highlight feeds are engineered for clicks. Sports media covers the market, not the fan.
FIELD works for you. It has no ads, no partners, and nothing to sell you.
What It Does
Drama Score
Every live game gets a score from 0 to 100. Tied in the fourth quarter with the series on the line scores differently than a blowout in January. The score reflects what the game actually is, not how many people are watching it.
Watch Window
Tells you the best game to watch right now and exactly where to find it — which app, which channel, whether you already pay for it. Not a list. A recommendation with a reason.
Written Journalism
A nightly brief, series previews, and Scout’s Picks written by an AI with one hard rule: it can only write what the data actually shows. If it didn’t happen, FIELD doesn’t say it did. No manufactured urgency. No invented storylines.
Game Flow
Reads the game as it’s being played. Knows when a team hasn’t scored in three quarters, when a pitcher is six innings into a no-hitter, when a team that trailed at half just took the lead. The signal changes when the game changes.
What It’s Building Toward
EMBER  —  Live game narratives written as the action unfolds. Not a score update. A sentence that puts this moment in context of everything that came before it.

Tournament Mode  —  World Cup. Wimbledon. Stanley Cup. Every bracket, every series, every elimination game tracked in one place with full broadcast and streaming context.

The Accountability Layer  —  FIELD tracks its own picks. If it told you a game was worth watching and it wasn’t, that gets recorded. No other sports product does this because no other sports product is on your side.

My Teams  —  All of the above, filtered through the lens of what you actually care about.
Live tonight. No install. No account.
Open FIELD →
jubilant-bassoon.jeffunglesbee.workers.dev
FIELD  ·  Global Sports Intelligence  ·  Built May 2026
